debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

proof:
have h (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction i generalizing l with
        | zero =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl => exact List.Perm.refl _
        | succ i' ih =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact ((ih tl (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi)).cons hd).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      have h1 := h l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := h l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).cons_inv
successful_attempts:
have h (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
        induction i generalizing l with
        | zero =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl => exact List.Perm.refl _
        | succ i' ih =>
          cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact ((ih tl (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi)).cons hd).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      have h1 := h l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := h l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).cons_inv
